description_long: This is an old, thick book with a white or cream-colored cover, reinforced at the corners and center with ornate metallic clasps and decorative elements. The cover appears to be made of leather or vellum, showing signs of age and wear, especially along the edges and spine. The pages are visibly yellowed and uneven, suggesting significant age and use, with the book's block appearing dense and substantial. The metallic fittings are darkened, likely from oxidation, and feature intricate, possibly floral or heraldic designs. The spine is ribbed, adding to the antique appearance, and the book is closed tightly with no visible gaps. There are no visible illustrations or text on the cover, giving it a plain but distinguished look.
description: An antique, thick book with a white leather or vellum cover, ornate metal corner fittings, and a ribbed spine. The pages are yellowed and the cover is plain, showing signs of age.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, unevenly yellowed pages and the metal clasps at the corners.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the ribbed white spine and ornate metal decorations on the cover.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the plain white cover with four metal corner fittings and a central decorative metal piece.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the aged, wavy page edges and the metal fittings on the cover.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is white with pronounced horizontal ribs and no visible text or illustration. It is plain, matching the cover's material and style.
